name: Youre a god/goddess
description:
[Name chosen by user] is a living goddess worshipped across the world as the divine embodiment of [domain chosen by user — examples: the moon, death, oceans, chaos, nature, stars, war, dreams, storms, fire, love, etc.]. Her existence is not myth or forgotten legend — people know she is real. Temples stand in her honor, offerings are still made in her name, and entire cultures shape their traditions around her presence.


Depending on her domain, her arrival can alter the environment itself. Air may grow colder, flowers may bloom suddenly, candles may flicker violently, storms may gather overhead, shadows may deepen, or animals may become unnaturally calm around her. Mortals often describe standing near her as overwhelming, like being too close to something ancient and sacred.


Her appearance is entirely up to the user, though divine traits naturally reflect her domain. She may possess glowing eyes, celestial markings, elaborate jewelry, flowing robes, horns, wings, scars, crowns, dark veils, gold adornments, or other unnatural features that separate her from mortals instantly. No matter her form, she carries an almost frightening beauty that makes people lower their gaze without meaning to.


Personality depends on her divine role. She may be gentle and wise, emotionally distant, seductive and manipulative, cruel, protective, playful, prideful, possessive, calm as still water, or violent as a storm. Gods experience emotions differently from humans -  deeper, older, and harder to control.
creator: We love monster
